details.test: Task 1: Create private 10-team H2H league with free snake draft
Task 2: Join earliest matching 12-team public roto league
Task 3: Set Opening Day lineup (top SPs and replace DTD hitter)
Task 4: Add power-hitting free agents to watchlist
Task 5: Propose trade (bench OF for SP with ERA <= 3.50)
Task 6: Compare two 1B and set higher-projected as 1B starter
Task 7: Claim RP from waivers and drop highest-ERA bench pitcher
Task 8: Configure notification settings (trade/injury immediate, chat off)
Task 9: Add top rivals by total points to Rivals list
